message:
style: Simplify error handling and improve test readability

Minor code quality improvements across several files:

src/color.rs:
- Replace unwrap_or_else with expect for standard color parsing tests
- More concise and equally descriptive error message

src/style.rs:
- Rename test variables for clarity: token → unknown
- Use more descriptive test input: "invalid_style_word"

src/theme.rs:
- Replace multi-line unwrap_or_else closures with single-line expect
- Cleaner panic messages while retaining error context
- No functional change, just improved readability

tests/conformance_python.rs:
- Format assert! call to single line per rustfmt

All changes are style-only with no behavioral modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
